content.en:
The Heavenly Realm.

Ye Tian came here and explained his purpose, the Taitian Realm did not stop him and let him in.

Soon.

He saw a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm in the Taitian Realm, and his cultivation should be very close to the Eternal Realm God Realm.

"I've seen the Heaven Survey Dao Master!"

Ye Tian said politely.

"Lord Ye Tianguo, do you want to take over the mission of our Taitian Realm? If the mission fails, we will not give any benefit. The Heaven Survey Dao Lord said.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded, "However, once the task is completed, I want the ultimate Eternal Dao Boundary Stone." "

"Good!"

The Sky Survey Dao Master also agreed.

Of course, he didn't have much hope for Ye Tian, he only hoped that one of the many half-step Eternal Realm God Realms who took over the task this time could complete the task and rescue the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm who was in their Taitian Realm.

"Heaven Survey Dao Master, can you give me the details of the mission now?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!"

The Heaven Survey Dao Master gave Ye Tian all the details of this mission.

After Ye Tian finished reading it, he knew that this task was not simple, no wonder Taitian was willing to give such a rich reward.

And.

The identity of this half-step Eternal Realm God Realm should not be simple, maybe it has something to do with the Eternal Realm God Realm of the Taitian Realm, otherwise the Taitian Realm would not be willing to pay such a price.

According to the informational materials.

This half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm is called Dongping Dao Lord, Dongping Dao Lord went to Jiudu River and was trapped in a place in Jiudu River.

That place has its own realm, and the Eternal Realm Divine Realm cannot enter, only a half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm can enter under the condition of suppressing strength.

Previously, the Taitian Realm sent a half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm to try to come to the rescue, but a half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm also fell, and the others were injured and returned.

There was no way, they could only hope that a powerful half-step Eternal Realm God Realm would rescue the Dongping Dao Lord.

As for whether there is hope, they are also not clear.

......

"Jiudu River, the only place to go back to the Endless Country, I didn't expect such a dangerous place'. "

Ye Tian then shuttled directly to the Jiudu River.

Not long after, Ye Tian came to the Jiudu River, and according to the address given by the Taitian Realm, he came to a certain place in the Jiudu River.

"This is it!"

Ye Tian stood on top of the Jiudu River and saw a whirlpool, this whirlpool led to a strange place in the Jiudu River, where it was very dangerous, and the half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm could fall, and the reason why the half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm in the Taitian Realm had not yet fallen was that there were probably more life-saving things.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered this whirlpool and entered this strange place.

"Come in!"

As soon as Ye Tian came in, he sensed the breath of an innate demon seed creature, and they quickly surrounded and killed.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian used the Ruin Sun Realm and the Ruin Sun Spear to fight against these innate demon creatures.

There are many innate demon creatures here, and all of them are very powerful.

Even Ye Tian took a little effort to kill them.

After that, Ye Tian went deep into this place and began to look for the traces of the Dongping Dao Master.

......

Thundered!!!

In the void ahead, a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm was slaughtering the innate demon creatures, and it seemed that they were in a bitter battle.

Ye Tian sneaked into the past, and immediately used his copying talent to probe, and found that the other party was not the Dongping Dao Master, but should be the other half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses who came to rescue the Dongping Dao Master.

"It's a competitor, so don't help him!"

Ye Tian retreated silently.

His goal was to save the Dongping Dao Lord, and the other half-step Eternal Realm God Realm had nothing to do with him.

Soon, Ye Tian encountered a danger.

Rumble!!!!!

The void cracked, and a vine shuttled in, piercing directly.

Ye Tian tried to resist, but was still knocked away by this vine.

"What a terrifying power!"

When Ye Tian tried to kill the other party, this vine disappeared.

"Xuanlin Ancient Vine!"

That's the name of this vine.

"It should be something similar to the evil vine, I can sense that this thing can affect the Eternal Demon Seed, and the attack power is very terrifying, it is definitely comparable to the blow of the top half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, and one of the vines of the Xuanlin Ancient Vine has such strength, and the strength of its body may be above me. "

Ye Tian muttered.

The point was that the attack power of this Xuanlin Ancient Vine seemed to be able to reach any part of this strange place, and even Ye Tian couldn't sense where its main body was.

It is undoubtedly difficult to kill this Xuanlin Ancient Vine.

"There is no such Xuanlin Ancient Vine in the information of the Taitian Realm, could it be that those half-step Eternal Realm God Realms dare not come in to rescue?"

Ye Tian guessed.

Time passed slowly, and the scope of Ye Tian's exploration continued to expand.

"There seem to be a lot of resources here, so let's get resources while looking for them!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Gradually, most of the area of this strange treasure land was almost explored by Ye Tian, and he came directly to the depths here.

And he was also attacked again and again by Xuanlin Guman, but he blocked them all.

Finally, in the deepest part of this treasure land, he sensed the Dongping Dao Lord.

......

In an area, the Dongping Dao Lord seemed to have inspired a treasure to form a shield, and he was blocked by dense vines all around, and there was no way to escape from here.

However, Xuanlin Guman's attack couldn't shatter the shield of the Dongping Dao Lord for a while, so it was stalemate.

Of course, the state of the Dongping Daoist is very bad, and his breath is very weak.

The point is that there is a problem with the Eternal Dao Seed of the Dongping Dao Lord, and there seems to be signs of demonization, which causes his consciousness to be not very sober (Nuo Li Zhao).

"The state of the Dongping Daoist is a little troublesome, if he deduces it for a while, he will definitely be transformed into a demon seed!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

A Dongping Dao Master who has been transformed into a demon seed, even if he is rescued, will the Taitian Realm still want it? Will he still fulfill his promise?

"The Xuanlin Ancient Vine must be subdued as soon as possible!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He specified a battle plan, that is, to condense another copy body, one of his copy bodies dragged Xuanlin Gu Man, and the other copy body rescued the Dongping Dao Lord.

In this way, the success rate will be high.

Soon.

Ye Tian condensed a copy body and killed the Xuanlin Ancient Vine.

Thundered!!!!!

The battle began.

Ye Tian's attack power was very strong, allowing Xuanlin Gu Man to attack Ye Tian with all his strength.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's other copy body went straight to the Dongping Dao Lord.
